description_long: This is a medium-sized, bucket-shaped handbag with a cylindrical body and a slightly flared top. The exterior appears to be made of a dark, possibly leather or faux leather material, with a subtle sheen that suggests a smooth finish. Two thin, rounded handles are attached symmetrically on either side, allowing for easy carrying by hand or over the forearm. The bag's opening is wide, and there is no visible closure mechanism, indicating an open-top design. The overall silhouette is simple and functional, with no visible decorative elements or branding. The color palette is predominantly dark, with hints of brown and black tones.
description: A dark, bucket-shaped handbag with a smooth finish and two thin side handles, featuring a simple, open-top design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the conical profile and one thin handle extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the bag, both handles visible, and the open top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the handle curving outward.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel and both handles, with the open top clearly visible.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rounded side handles; non-adjustable; attached at the upper sides of the bag.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Open top; no visible closure mechanism.
